TiDB-PD 写盘延迟大于 1s ，leader 写盘慢会导致 leader: TiDB - PD disk write latency exceeds 1s; slow leader writes cause leader switches
TiDB-PD 节点之间网络延迟大于 1s: TiDB - network latency between PD nodes exceeds 1s
TiDB-tidb CPU 使用率超过可用 CPU的 80%: TiDB - tidb CPU usage exceeds 80% of available CPU
TiDB-tidb 最近 15 分钟加载 schema 出现错误: TiDB - tidb schema load errors in the last 15 minutes
TiDB-tidb 最近五分钟出现跳过 binlog: TiDB - tidb skipped binlog in the last 5 minutes
TiDB-tidb 最近十分钟加载 schema 失败大于 10 次: TiDB - tidb schema load failed more than 10 times in the last 10 minutes
TiDB-tikv 5分钟内内存增长大于 5G: TiDB - tikv memory grew more than 5G within 5 minutes
TiDB-集群中出现状态为 down 的 tikv 数量大于 0: TiDB - tikv instances in down state above 0
通常 tikv 实例刚启动时会触发。或者有较复杂的计算 offload 到 ti: Usually triggered right after a tikv instance starts, or when complex computation offloaded to tikv briefly raises memory; analyze the specific SQL statements.
通常有连接泄露，需分析主要是与哪个对象的连接。: Usually a connection leak; analyze which target holds most of the connections.
集群不可用，可能 pd 多数派故障，需要分析日志查看无法选举 leader 的原: Cluster unavailable, possibly a PD majority failure; analyze the logs to find why a leader cannot be elected.
需要检查 tikv 是否有删除数据但空间未释放的问题，如果是正常的空间使用，则需: Check whether tikv has deleted data whose space was not reclaimed; if the space usage is legitimate, scale out tikv nodes.
